ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern Conference, Western Conference) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic Division, Central Division) */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_handle" TEXT /* Team's Facebook handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Team's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the season took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoff_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that won the championship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_champion_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that played the game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (home or away) */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first referee */,
  "referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second referee */,
  "referee_3" TEXT /* Name of the third referee */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., point guard, power forward) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Player's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* League's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_handle" TEXT /* League's Facebook handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* League's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the division's logo */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Division's Twitter handle */,
  "facebook_handle" TEXT /* Division's Facebook handle */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Division's Instagram handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, coach) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (nullable) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
